mapper.sql: select r.record_id, r.seckill_id, r.member_id, r.member_no, r.member_name, r.seckill_date, r.payment_method, r.shares, r.total_amount, case when r.status = '1' and coalesce(cs.claimed_shares, 0) = 0 then coalesce(r.shares, 0) else coalesce(cs.claimed_shares, 0) end as claimed_shares, greatest(coalesce(r.shares, 0) - case when r.status = '1' and coalesce(cs.claimed_shares, 0) = 0 then coalesce(r.shares, 0) else coalesce(cs.claimed_shares, 0) end, 0) as remaining_shares, r.status, r.claim_time, r.claim_by, r.create_by, r.create_time, r.update_by, r.update_time, r.del_flag, r.remark, s.seckill_name, s.seckill_price, r.dept_id, r.version from mem_seckill_record r left join mem_seckill s on r.seckill_id = s.seckill_id left join ( select record_id, sum(claim_shares) as claimed_shares from mem_seckill_claim_record where del_flag = '0' group by record_id ) cs on r.record_id = cs.record_id
mapper.insert:
insert into mem_seckill_record
seckill_id, dept_id, member_id, member_no, member_name, seckill_date, payment_method, shares, total_amount, status, create_by, remark, create_time
#{seckillId}, #{deptId}, #{memberId}, #{memberNo}, #{memberName}, #{seckillDate}, #{paymentMethod}, #{shares}, #{totalAmount}, #{status}, #{createBy}, #{remark}, sysdate()
mapper.update: update mem_seckill_record set status = #{status}, claim_time = sysdate(), claim_by = #{claimBy}, update_time = sysdate() where record_id = #{recordId} and del_flag = '0'
mapper.select:
select coalesce(d.dict_label, r.payment_method, '其他') as paymentMethodName, count(*) as recordCount, coalesce(sum(r.shares), 0) as shares, coalesce(sum(r.total_amount), 0) as amount from mem_seckill_record r left join sys_dict_data d on d.dict_type = 'finance_payment_method' and d.status = '0' and d.dict_value = r.payment_method where r.del_flag = '0' and r.seckill_id = #{seckillId} and r.member_no like concat('%', #{memberNo}, '%')
AND r.seckill_date >= #{params.beginTime}
AND r.seckill_date < DATE_ADD(#{params.endTime}, INTERVAL 1 DAY)
group by coalesce(d.dict_label, r.payment_method, '其他') order by recordCount desc
mapper.delete: update mem_seckill_record set del_flag = '1' where record_id = #{recordId}

update mem_seckill_record set del_flag = '1' where record_id in
#{recordId}
